checks.expectation: Log in as admin via drush uli, navigate to /admin/reports/view-analytics -- verify the analytics report page loads without errors and displays the report structure (via eval-browser)
checks.evidence: Page rendered with title 'View Analytics | Drush Site-Install', HTTP 200. Report table structure present with columns: Node Title, Node ID, View Count. Page loaded without errors and display table with proper report structure.
